text: Under Section 7.2, the BQBYTE Compliance Score (0-100) is a weighted composite of five components: Quality Systems 30%, Document Compliance 20%, Corrective Action Closure 20%, Regulatory Adherence 15%, Ethical Standards 15%. A score below 70 at a scheduled audit triggers a mandatory follow-up audit within 60 days at the supplier's cost. The individual component scores are not stored in the supplier performance data, so only the final composite score is available.

Orrentek Precision Mfg (SUP-001), Tier-1, China (APAC), has an average Compliance Score of 86.3 across 18 audits (range 80-96). The score is the Section 7.2 weighted composite (Quality Systems 30%, Document Compliance 20%, Corrective Action Closure 20%, Regulatory Adherence 15%, Ethical Standards 15%). Its lowest recorded score is 80, so the supplier is above the 70-point follow-up threshold.
